## Purpose

Describe the mathematical, reproducibility, editorial or visual change.

## Evidence

- [ ] Exact calculation, test or primary source supplied.
- [ ] No unsupported institutional endorsement introduced.
- [ ] Attribution and chronology remain explicit.

## Verification

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -v`
- [ ] Independent verifier passes.
- [ ] JSON Schema validation passes.
- [ ] Paper compiles without undefined references.
